# R&S Cleaning Solutions

> Full-service cleaning, detailing, landscaping, moving, and property care company founded by Reggie, serving Key West, FL and the surrounding Florida Keys. Available 7 days a week, 7AM–7PM. Tagline: Clean Spaces, Clear Minds, Total Solutions: Your All-in-One Property Care Experts.

## About
R&S Cleaning Solutions is owned and operated by Reggie, a Key West local based at 5790 Maloney Ave. The business provides professional residential and commercial cleaning, auto and boat detailing, landscaping, pressure washing, pest control, post-construction cleaning, window washing, trash can cleaning, moving, and junk removal. Rated 5.0 stars with 21 reviews on Yelp (April 2026). The business philosophy: "We aren't just cleaners — we are property caretakers."

## Services

### Residential & Commercial Cleaning
- [Residential & Commercial Cleaning](#services): Regular and one-time cleaning contracts for homes, offices, and vacation rentals throughout the Florida Keys.
- [Post Construction Cleaning](#services): Thorough cleanup after renovation or new construction — dust, debris, and residue removed so the space is move-in ready.
- [Move In & Move Out Cleaning](#services): Deep cleaning before or after occupancy for renters and homeowners.
- [Sanitation & Disinfecting](#services): EPA-approved disinfection for homes and businesses.
- [Wood Cleaning](#services): Specialized treatment for wood surfaces, decks, and docks.
- [Window Washing](#services): Interior and exterior window cleaning — salt air and humidity cloud glass fast.
- [Trash Can Cleaning](#services): Pressure-wash and disinfect residential and commercial trash cans inside and out.

### Specialized Detailing (Land & Sea)
- [Boat Detailing](#services): Hull cleaning, interior detailing, and marine surface restoration in Key West.
- [Auto Detailing](#services): Full interior and exterior vehicle detailing.
- [Pressure & Deep Cleaning](#services): High-pressure washing for driveways, building exteriors, docks, and marine surfaces.

### Outdoor & Property Maintenance
- [Landscaping](#services): Lawn maintenance, tropical plant care, tree trimming.
- [Moving & Bulk Pick Up](#services): Full-service moving plus debris removal and bulk item hauling.
- [Extermination](#services): Pest control and extermination for homes and businesses.

## Recurring Service Plans
- Weekly Plan: Full interior cleaning, window washing, trash can sanitizing, disinfection, lawn maintenance.
- Bi-Weekly Plan: Deep interior clean, window washing, trash can sanitizing, landscaping maintenance — most popular option.
- Monthly Plan: Full deep clean, window washing, trash can sanitizing, pressure wash, landscaping refresh — ideal for vacation rentals and snowbirds.

## Contact

- Service Area: Key West, Stock Island, Big Coppitt Key, Monroe County, Florida
